## Summary

What changed?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate:data`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

For a manual data-sync PR, also confirm:

- [ ] Followed `docs/MANUAL_SYNC.md`.
- [ ] `npm run discover:war-bundles` and `npm run sync:war` completed.
- [ ] `data/sync-metadata.json` reports `fresh`.

## Data / Source Notes

- [ ] Case data uses official-source URLs only.
- [ ] No invented dates, locations, coordinates, or provenance.
- [ ] Official source links remain visible.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.
